overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character with blue hair through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The scene features heavy downpour, neon-lit futuristic architecture, and wet reflective streets as the character navigates intersections, sidewalks, and an elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with neon-lit buildings

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives through intersection from left to right
camera begins crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wet intersection, avoiding vehicles and moving toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan with glowing headlights driving through the intersection
pedestrian in red clothing crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: multi-story building with horizontal green neon strip lighting and glass facade
large vertical digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow and black diagonal stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked futuristic intersection at night, dominated by a large building with green neon strips on the left. The camera moves forward across the wide crosswalk, navigating around a futuristic sedan and a pedestrian in red, with tall digital billboards visible in the distance through the heavy downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with ground-level shops and scaffolding

events.description: moving from open intersection onto covered sidewalk area beside the MARK building
passing close to large concrete street planter with tree briefly blocking right side of view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the green MARK building, observing storefronts and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding red umbrella walking in opposite direction along the sidewalk
pedestrian standing near the MARK building entrance taking shelter from rain

entered.detail: green commercial building with yellow MARK signage and construction scaffolding
large rectangular concrete planters containing mature trees lining the sidewalk
tall building facade with vertical pink neon light strips

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open intersection onto the sidewalk beside the distinctive green MARK building. The path continues past concrete planters with trees and various pedestrians, including one with a red umbrella walking toward the camera. The neon-green building recedes into the background as pink neon lights become visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk transitioning to elevated walkway stairs

events.description: approaching and beginning to ascend wide concrete stairs leading to elevated walkway
reaching the top of stairs and transitioning onto the elevated pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and climbing the concrete stairs to reach the upper level walkway

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking up the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with dark metal railings leading upward to elevated level
transparent glass safety railing with blue metallic frames overlooking the street
large circular neon sign with purple glow mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The path continues past the last of the street trees toward a concrete staircase. The character ascends the stairs, moving from the exposed street level to a sheltered elevated walkway. A circular purple neon sign becomes visible ahead as the camera climbs, with glass railings appearing on the right overlooking the street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings and vending machines

events.description: entering covered section of elevated walkway with overhead roof structure
passing by illuminated vending machines and concrete benches along the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway, overlooking the neon-lit street below through glass railings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on the street level below visible through the glass railing

entered.detail: illuminated vending machine with purple and blue neon lighting and digital display
modern concrete benches with glowing blue accent lighting underneath
overhead curved roof structure providing shelter from the rain

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on the elevated walkway with blue-tinted glass railings overlooking the street. The path leads past illuminated vending machines and glowing benches under a covered roof section. The circular purple neon sign remains visible ahead as the walkway curves, offering an elevated view of the cyberpunk cityscape below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-drenched futuristic intersection into the crowded pedestrian corridors of a neon-lit city. It begins by gliding across a broad crosswalk amidst a heavy downpour, navigating past a futuristic sedan and a pedestrian in red while towering digital billboards loom in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the open space of the intersection narrows into a sidewalk beside a large building defined by striking green neon strips. The scene then shifts past concrete planters and oncoming pedestrians, including one with a red umbrella, as the green architecture recedes. Finally, the perspective pushes further along the walkway, leaving the green glow behind as vibrant pink neon lights emerge to illuminate the left side of the frame.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the rain-exposed street level up onto a sheltered, neon-lit elevated walkway. It begins by passing the final street trees and ascending a concrete staircase, moving the character away from the open road. As the camera climbs, glass railings emerge on the right and a circular purple neon sign comes into view ahead, marking the transition to the covered path. The scene then expands along the walkway, gliding past illuminated vending machines and glowing benches under a protective roof. Finally, the path curves to reveal a sweeping, elevated perspective of the cyberpunk cityscape below, framed by blue-tinted glass railings.
